title: Operate remotely piloted system for conservation work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate remotely piloted system for conservation work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine operational plan for use of remotely piloted system

pcs.text: Clarify and confirm objectives of RPS operations plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify and confirm objectives of RPS operations plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify and confirm objectives of RPS operations plan.

pcs.text: Confirm location and operational route of system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location and operational route of system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location and operational route of system.

pcs.text: Identify operating conditions and hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify operating conditions and hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify operating conditions and hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select equipment and materials required for RPS operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select equipment and materials required for RPS operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select equipment and materials required for RPS operations.

pcs.text: Confirm workplace operating procedure to be followed with supervisor/controller
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm workplace operating procedure to be followed with supervisor/controller?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace operating procedure to be followed with supervisor/controller.

pcs.text: Verify licences, permits and agreements have been approved for operations according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify licences, permits and agreements have been approved for operations according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify licences, permits and agreements have been approved for operations according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine operational plan for use of remotely piloted system

elements.title: Prepare and transport equipment and resources

pcs.text: Assemble equipment and materials required for RPS operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble equipment and materials required for RPS operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble equipment and materials required for RPS operations.

pcs.text: Check equipment for correct operations and functionality according to operator instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment for correct operations and functionality according to operator instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment for correct operations and functionality according to operator instructions.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain RPS ready for use, and rectify faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain RPS ready for use, and rectify faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain RPS ready for use, and rectify faults.

pcs.text: Transport equipment to site/s and prepare for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport equipment to site/s and prepare for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport equipment to site/s and prepare for operation.

pcs.text: Set parameters for RPS according to operations plan and operational route
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set parameters for RPS according to operations plan and operational route?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set parameters for RPS according to operations plan and operational route.

pcs.text: Test and calibrate equipment under field conditions in preparation for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test and calibrate equipment under field conditions in preparation for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test and calibrate equipment under field conditions in preparation for operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare and transport equipment and resources

elements.title: Commence use of piloted system

pcs.text: Operate RPS according to safe operating procedures (SOP), planned route and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate RPS according to safe operating procedures (SOP), planned route and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate RPS according to safe operating procedures (SOP), planned route and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and record operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and record operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and record operations.

pcs.text: Perform RPS tasks according to RPS operations plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform RPS tasks according to RPS operations plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform RPS tasks according to RPS operations plan.

pcs.text: Record and report incidents and unplanned events to supervisor/controller
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report incidents and unplanned events to supervisor/controller?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report incidents and unplanned events to supervisor/controller.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Commence use of piloted system

elements.title: Finalise operation of remotely piloted system for conservation work

pcs.text: Shut down and disassemble RPS according to operator instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shut down and disassemble RPS according to operator instructions.

pcs.text: Process data files

pcs.text: Maintain and store RPS according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain and store RPS according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report results of RPS operations according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report results of RPS operations according to workplace procedures.
